professional_summary: A Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience in PHP development, leveraging frameworks like Laravel and Symfony to design and implement secure, scalable web applications. Proficient in RESTful API development, database management (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle), and front-end integration using JavaScript technologies. Experienced in optimizing cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure, utilizing DevOps tools like Docker and Kubernetes for containerized development and deployment. Adept at working in Agile environments, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives and ensuring adherence to industry best practices.
